channel.title: Replication on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Replication on ivomarino.com

item.title: ZFS Offsite Backups on FreeBSD: Incremental Replication at Scale
item.description: ZFS snapshots are the foundation for efficient backups. Learn how to replicate them to offsite targets at scale using zfs-autobackup, from simple pairs (lab scale) to hub-and-spoke architectures (production). Includes real numbers and deployment patterns for 1TB+ datasets with minute-level incremental backups.
